nasb.text: Because of this the king became indignant and very furious and gave orders to destroy all the wise men of Babylon.

esv.text: Because of this the king was angry and very furious, and commanded that all the wise men of Babylon be destroyed.

cnv.text: 因此，王大發烈怒，下令殺絕巴比倫所有的智慧人。

ccb.text: 王大怒，下令处死巴比伦所有的智者。
